Economy Rental.description: Budget-friendly car for short city trips
examples: Maruti Alto, Wagon R, Hyundai Santro
Economy Rental.best_for: Short city errands, budget travel, 1-2 days
Economy Rental.action: Go to Home → Book a Car → Filter by Economy

Standard Rental.description: Mid-range sedan or hatchback for everyday use
examples: Maruti Swift, Hyundai i20, Honda City
Standard Rental.action: Go to Home → Book a Car → Filter by Standard

Premium Rental.description: Premium sedan or mid-size SUV, spacious and comfortable
examples: Hyundai Creta, Tata Nexon, Kia Seltos
Premium Rental.action: Go to Home → Book a Car → Filter by SUV / Premium

Luxury Package.description: Luxury sedan or SUV with professional driver
Luxury Package.best_for: Corporate, weddings, airport transfers, VIP events

With Driver Standard.description: Standard car with a platform-assigned driver, priced per km
examples: Swift, i20, Innova depending on availability
With Driver Standard.best_for: Outstation trips, when you don't want to drive
With Driver Standard.action: Go to Book a Car → Choose 'With Driver' option

Standard Delivery.description: Normal parcel, no special handling needed
Standard Delivery.tip: Pack securely in a box or bag

Express with Insurance.handling: Priority pickup, driver notified of value
Express with Insurance.tip: Mention item value in description so driver is careful

Special Handling Required.description: Fragile or perishable items needing extra care
Special Handling Required.handling: Driver informed to handle with care. Package yourself very securely.
Special Handling Required.tip: Use 'FRAGILE' label on the box. Bubble wrap recommended.

High Risk — Contact Support.description: Item needs special arrangement before shipping
High Risk — Contact Support.handling: Cannot be handled through standard parcel flow
High Risk — Contact Support.tip: Contact CarRentalPro support for special logistics arrangements
